common_ai_mistakes.name: unnecessary_boxing
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI uses Integer, Long, Double wrapper types when primitives (int, long, double) would suffice. Wrappers cause unnecessary boxing.
common_ai_mistakes.detection: Detect Integer/Long/Double variable declarations in non-generic contexts.
common_ai_mistakes.fix: Use primitive types (int, long, double) unless generics require wrapper types.

common_ai_mistakes.name: verbose_null_checks
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI writes verbose null-check chains instead of using Objects.requireNonNull, Optional, or pattern matching.
common_ai_mistakes.detection: Detect chains of if (x != null) { if (x.y != null) { ... } }.

common_ai_mistakes.name: mutable_collections_exposed
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI returns mutable internal collections directly, allowing callers to modify the object's state. Return unmodifiable views instead.
common_ai_mistakes.detection: Detect methods returning internal List/Set/Map fields directly.
